textByHashes.d9dbc51a7d698bbd69d93b5c2059eda38799f964: No... I found something. A door.
textByHashes.8423c7e0078095ffe3d8d823ed0792bac07e0d97: It's buried beneath a tonne of rocks. Could be the entrance to some ancient ruins...
textByHashes.aa27e49f3aa44cf80943823c6fc0fc8832dd3353: Of course I am! I'm the greatest archaeologist of our time. The name's Willow! Have you not heard of me?
textByHashes.56de15f17103dd6caa48d6b1902fbfbc65be9128: You bet I am, but I don't think there's any other way in.
textByHashes.2cf2310b5965fd971f49ab4ca5967ff298311e7a: Potentially, but I won't be able to do it on my own. Nor can I leave the area. If I'm not here to guard the entrance, some other archaeologist might come along and steal the glory from me!
textByHashes.4104b25dba5e959f71e406054c3e8fc4471a4f2a: Maybe you could give me a hand? There could be untold riches inside the ruins!
textByHashes.1509d9a32f5a2cdf6807de2f4a94693d0353c944: The entrance is covered in rocks and rubble - I don't think mining them will work.
textByHashes.0f13a7ad940c4c49d57c812049bf5f12d587c625: We'll need something stronger. Who knows what could be inside the ruins. There could be traps, or even monsters!
textByHashes.8e69e764cc5eac973251691c641ff58bebf474a8: No, I think we'll need to get my old crew...
textByHashes.e007a83b3a147ddfe1519d276d6e0045a8959620: ...I mean, excavation team together. But you'll need to convince them to help us. We didn't part on the best of terms.
textByHashes.a4f6e0bbe19b23c63437837d7ba8325396579ab2: We had a falling out after a, uhm... dig, went wrong.
textByHashes.141ab1ef0c34cee52ec72b545fc6eff0a4cbbcbd: To get into the ruins we'll need to blow up all the rocks blocking the entrance.
textByHashes.0422bed6321aea97be7d780d788fb359c666ef56: No! We need to get in there as soon as possible! Burntof the dwarf will do it. He's a master with explosives.
textByHashes.bc4fbf64ad8a69d5f2e8841f915c0f6e42381045: From what I can remember, he's a fan of his drink. His favourite pub being the Rising Sun Inn, in Falador - I'd look there first.
textByHashes.c3d138961968759841f3ee96911549cb9b1eff00: After we've blown the rocks away, we'll need someone to move all the rubble. Someone strong.
textByHashes.d246cd433ff075dfd5fb73aed9f7d2e570c1730d: Ha ha ha! I don't think so. We need a real strongman - someone with muscles. An old friend of mine, Checkal, should be able to do all the heavy lifting.
textByHashes.a275345befc55697fc51968b5d12234c4fc481d9: Ha ha ha! I don't think so. We need a real strongwoman - someone with muscles. An old friend of mine, Checkal, should be able to do all the heavy lifting.
textByHashes.1419d56f66bbfc6f7e3d4134d3470db002724265: Hmm... We had quite a rough falling out when we last spoke, but I heard he's hanging around Barbarian Village.
textByHashes.221f95072349eff039c98b73f27b7e40da725a86: Lastly, if my hunch is correct, this place will be covered in traps. We'll need my pal Marley to disarm them. He's the best thief I know. Been doing it for years.
textByHashes.67b2cf34c229fcc74ef4ad2516db138c603498ab: I have no idea where he is these days. But his cousin Charlie in Varrock may know. You should talk to him. He's normally somewhere near the Blue Moon Inn.
textByHashes.9bfcb09b7469b47fd788ec1d502740e05286b7d5: Good luck. Once you've recruited one of the team, I'll meet them at the entrance. It's on the west side of the mountain.
textByHashes.eef4a99ed02a7cbbda0aceca0bc4319ef0de47b6: Back again? What can I help you with?
textByHashes.7a8d86e56aa4e601ea763f6336f9e3c20e06921a: Marley is an elusive one, to be honest. I have no idea where to find him. You should try talk to his cousin Charlie near the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock. Maybe he will know.
textByHashes.9d7a008fb8412e5139423c7491f2a97487622720: Last I heard Checkal was hanging around Barbarian Village. Maybe you should head there to find him?
textByHashes.eaa8d7bbceb99e0d799a0ba0733ae533cea0ecd9: Burntof likes to hang out at the Rising Sun Inn located in Falador.
textByHashes.22387198f3f08f6b8dbee647a9122426846ef40b: On the western side of Ice Mountain. There's no way up on this side so you'll need to head east of here first and go around the dwarf colony to get there.
textByHashes.396313fc856f193c2a70c9381187bfd5c9d64917: Hurry up! It's not exactly exciting standing out here all day.
textByHashes.69a8231d2fee337fcb438239935ed8d7717c1463: [sigh] How many archaeologists do you actually know?
textByHashes.8df0ebaf7e163a564a2768410349da58493f5330: Exactly. So who are you to judge? Anyway, we're all here and ready to break in... Um, I mean excavate... the entrance.
textByHashes.14a8c633b345ebad375aa41c5efee6c7cb67bee1: Are you ready? Who knows what's inside the ruins?
textByHashes.766110ea8233ac3bd4ef8cbfeff3a28b51f0469a: Right, that's everyone gathered. Thank you, , for all your help.
textByHashes.490027322c3f9533986dfecbebfb91ea5e7c5522: Okay everyone, we've wasted enough time. Let's crack this door open. Burntof, you're up!
textByHashes.5e2e548af59e52e2c86dcb83d9b15385978d2739: Try not to blow the entire mountain up this time...
textByHashes.04e9dcd3f71f6944807737e4df3016cc4b68aa4e: He's right, the rock's been broken up. Checkal, it's your turn.
textByHashes.922bf5cdb264d9d87770920a112712c18eee56fd: Don't be sorry, Checkal. Gotta put those muscles to use somehow.
textByHashes.5122bcde380f22165aa4a473e3bdaf159abca437: Alright Marley, in you go. Let us know if you find anything.
textByHashes.d4b142ea2909e79797c23938bb9086ba9145a770: You're impressed? There's nothing here but dust and fallen rocks.
textByHashes.d8c72d0a26c99b4d9c5f283c93bfc228fd775372: Thrilled? What's there to be excited about? I don't see any gold, diamonds, rare gems or piles of lost treasure!
textByHashes.e5c83517ce9aa9d639c182fa044f13fce3bd07f0: Of course it's about the money. It's always been about money, you fool.
textByHashes.5be1819b5e252c6bd2a48f495794c108e5fa41b9: We're not a team of archaeologist, you idiot. We're grave robbers looking for their next score.
textByHashes.b11b807ab871a11035d5acc9230c35b293664dcf: Yep, and you were surprisingly easy to convince. I'll admit, you have been a tremendous help, .
textByHashes.9953ab365a6383055ed90079f43518f38925b078: But your usefulness has come to an end I'm afraid. I can't simply let you leave here.
textByHashes.faccc8b9c6ceb2d5d3d1ade95f3381b1cf604b23: I can't risk you running to the authorities and telling them about our little gang. We're wanted in quite a few large cities across Gielinor.
textByHashes.6bd3af61595b46b496eada449952d5c037cdf978: I'm afraid this is the end of the road for you, . This ruin is about to become your tomb.
textByHashes.c5a1a04944d283ea058b26eaa96d8eb0c029f15b: It feels like the quaking has finally stopped...
textByHashes.b6acf8b1fd572a8ab6dce46a8c0ab1fe1aecf7a3: Holy Zamorak! What is that thing?! Checkal, take it down!
textByHashes.e11530d6abe553b78a54baff968df5acc72bd8f3: You're right, Marley. Burntof, we're leaving!
textByHashes.9d76d6e901af8edf49e88db8eac4f38b8b189ac4: Hurry up then! We've waited long enough.
textByHashes.d7acc5f834630de2f2c33cd3f7371d482b9438ac: Are you finally ready to crack these ruins open?
textByHashes.d64747116b4debc4f6e16882ab2da85ad6423a48: Look , it was a simple misunderstanding, that's all...
textByHashes.929ecced484075a1240ef24c0b651f638364e2cc: Things got a little heated down there, but we all made it out alive, right?
textByHashes.7d8a7032b827e84dbd51539e16db52d7a205fa78: We thought you'd rat us out to the authorities, so we came out here to hide.
textByHashes.ff0ad1930ba214d76f593e1644d272cf6ad99b63: Plus, we heard there are some sealed tombs in the desert that haven't been touched in hundreds of years...
textByHashes.ce14d421c3f80cd58cf0dd61ddb3048e467d8202: Nothing you need to worry about.
